pageDescription: Manage right-click menu entries left by installers (7-Zip, OneDrive, Notepad++, etc.). Disable, re-enable, or remove them.
pageHeaderUnavailableDescription: This tool is only available on Windows.
notAvailableDescription: Context menu management uses the Windows registry and is not available on macOS or Linux.
emptyStateDescription: Find context menu entries added by installed apps and choose which ones to keep.
noResultsDescription: Try adjusting filters, or click Re-scan.
win11NoticeBody: On Windows 11, classic right-click entries appear under "Show more options" (or press Shift+F10).
filterSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, command, or DLL…
protectedTooltip: This entry is part of Windows or a critical app and cannot be modified.
adminTooltip: Modifying this entry requires administrator privileges.
confirmDeleteDescription: This will permanently remove {{count}} entry. The change is undoable only by importing the registry backup or reinstalling the source app.
confirmDeleteDescriptionPlural: This will permanently remove {{count}} entries. The change is undoable only by importing the registry backup or reinstalling the source apps.
createRestorePointFirst: Create a system restore point first
toastScanFailedDescription: Could not enumerate context menu entries.
toastApplyFailedDescription: Could not apply the requested changes.
elevationPrompt: Some selected entries require administrator privileges. Relaunch as admin?
